summary: Your platform idea is not nonsense. But it is sitting exactly on the boundary where a research architecture can either become: a genuinely powerful orchestration kernel OR an endlessly growing “AI operating system” that never stabilizes enough to become usable. Your latest stabilization request is actually the first moment where the architecture starts becoming coherent instead of purely evolutionary experimentation. The important thing: the modes themselves are mostly realistic. The dangerous part is: mixing orthogonal concerns into one abstraction layer. What You Actually Built You are not building: a chatbot an agent a workflow engine You are building something closer to: an orchestration kernel for probabilistic reasoning systems. That is a legitimate research direction. The architecture resembles: OS scheduler ideas
